name: tdwhere123/do-it
summary: Installable Codex and Claude Code workflow guardrail package that routes work by risk, constrains sub-agent delegation with explicit contracts, and uses Codex hooks plus review, fix, worktree, and verification skills to keep completion claims tied to fresh evidence.
evidence: README frames the package around three workflow moves: route the work, contract the delegation, and prove the result.
Codex target installs skills, agents, hook scripts, and root hooks.json into CODEX_HOME, with UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Stop hooks.
Subagent orchestration skill requires scope, write ownership, forbidden paths, must-verify facts, stop condition, and return schema.
Verification gate blocks completion-style claims after edits unless fresh command evidence appears in the recent transcript.
